name: Parapet Demo: Easy Test Rules
description: Safe demo rules that trigger on common, harmless transactions for testing Parapet protection.

rules.name: Demo: Block Large SOL Transfers
rules.description: Blocks SOL transfers greater than 0.1 SOL (safe for testing - adjust threshold as needed)

rule.message: 🛑 DEMO BLOCK: Transaction transfers more than 0.1 SOL

rules.name: Demo: Alert on Any SOL Transfer
rules.description: Alerts (doesn't block) on any SOL transfer to show detection without stopping transaction

rule.message: ⚠️ DEMO ALERT: SOL transfer detected - Parapet is analyzing your transaction

rules.name: Demo: Alert on Complex Transactions
rules.description: Alerts when transaction has more than 3 instructions (common in scams)

rule.message: ⚠️ DEMO ALERT: Complex transaction detected (>3 instructions)
